description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space and laptop compartment, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or office.Height: 20.5"Width: 11.8"Depth: 7" Made of polyester with a nylon lining and Cordura fabric for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with padded laptop compartment and zippered mesh pouch Printed facade on the outside Utility pocket on the front with organizing pouches, loop and mobile pouch with velcro closure Another utility pouch below it with zippered insert pocket on it nike tab appliqued on the bottom pocket Mesh pockets on the sides for carrying sipper and essentials Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries CareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
